g.text: WRONG PATH (shown for contrast): Direct Recursion via handle_write

div.p: Timing guarantee: deferred parse runs BEFORE next epoll_wait. Client receives Response 2 within the same reactor tick as Response 1.

g.text: Pipelining: Two Requests in One TCP Segment
REACTOR_READ Phase: ET Drain → Parse Request 1
Keep-Alive State Reset: Preserve Pipelined Bytes

ul.li: N pipelined requests = N recursive calls
